title: Monday.com to Whatsapp Integration
excerpt: Can we integrate Whatsapp to import all incoming messages and requests but be tagged back to an Item or Board?.

posts.author: Izzy (Israel Benson)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we integrate Whatsapp to import all incoming messages and requests but be tagged back to an Item or Board?.

posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Izzy ,

Thanks.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Izzy,

Welcome to the monday.com community! Indeed, you can connect WhatsApp with monday.com using WhatsApp Integrator by Lanum Tecnologia or WhatsApp integration by TimelinesAI. These are popular integrations available on the monday.com marketplace.

For seamless integration, I would recommend you seek help from seasoned monday.com professionals.

I’m not sure if this is exactly what you are looking for but

We built an app that allows you to communicate over whatsapp, imessage and telegram on monday.

We are constantly adding features.

You can check it out here: https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000600/supersend
